texto: Hush now, my darlingIt's all okayNothing can hurt youThe world won't end today Lay down your headGet some restThis time will passWe're coming up on the bestJust give it timeIt's all gonna changeBut remember it takes timeFor things to rearrangeThere are happy people in happy placesMy darling, out thereOne day, it'll changeOne day, it'll change
explicacao: Citação de Kaitlyn Deann sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Hush now, my darlingIt's all okayNothing can hurt youThe world won't end today Lay down your head…” articula tempo, song, reflexao em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.
